title: Music 2.0
description: Adds four new Music Disks to Minecraft
body:
!["Music 2.0"-Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/043d960c3081436db1028de9cee07dd79dba3fb8_0.webp)


---

Music 2.0 enhances your Minecraft experience by adding **four new music discs** featuring tracks from the talented artist Silas Geiert. These unique tunes bring a fresh vibe to your world.

Challenge yourself with a **new advancement**: collect all the music discs in the game — vanilla and modded — to unlock it and prove you're the ultimate collector.

Additionally, the mod is fully **survival friendly**, as all music discs can be found in mineshafts.

Get ready to bring new melodies to your adventures!
